title: Scented Candles Gift Set, Gifts for Women, 12 x 70 g Candles for Home Scented, Soy Wax Aromatherapy Candle Set, Ideal for Christmas, Birthday, Mother's Day, Valentine's Day, Dating, Yoga
features: 【12 Scented Candle Set】 12 popular floral fragrances including spring, lemon, gardenia, lavender, parisian cafe, figs, rosemary, freesia, French vanilla, jasmine, cranberry clove. EVERYTHING YOU NEED COMES - Light the candle and relax your mind.

【Safe Scented Candles】: Made with natural soy wax, distilled essential oil and lead-free cotton wick, this aromatherapy candle contains no harmful chemicals or additives, burns cleanly and evenly, and is ideal for meditation, yoga, dance, body relaxation and stress relief.

【240 Hours Long Lasting Scent】: Each scented candle weighs 70g and lasts 15-20 hours, the whole candle set lasts up to 240 hours. With the pleasant floral fragrance, a comfortable and aromatic atmosphere is created, which effectively relaxes your mind and body and allows you to enjoy freely all day long.

【Portable & Exquisite Glasses】: Each soy candle has a glass with exquisite artistic patterns. It is suitable for decorating your home or storing small items after use. In addition, the design of the glass container makes it convenient to take with you when travelling.

【Exquisite Gift Packaging】: The aromatherapy candles are packed in an exquisite folding box and are ideal as a gift for festivals or special occasions such as Valentine's Day, Mother's Day, birthday, anniversary, Thanksgiving and Christmas.
